mapper.insert: insert into private_message ( conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, content_type ) values ( #{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{contentType} )
mapper.select: select count(*) from private_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from private_message where receiver_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0 and is_deleted = 0
